steps.title: Write each pan count
steps.content: The number of $8$-inch pans is $n$. The number of $12$-inch pans is $5n$, because it is $5$ times the number of $8$-inch pans. The number of $6$-inch pans is $13$.

steps.title: Add the counts
steps.content:
The total number of frying pans is $121$, so add the three counts:
$$5n+n+13=121$$
$$6n+13=121$$The answer is D.
